top3.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1)) +
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE UserId = (SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1)) AS total_posts_and_comments

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1)) +
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE UserId = (SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1)) AS total_posts_and_comments

WITH latest_user AS (
  SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM latest_user)) +
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE UserId = (SELECT Id FROM latest_user)) AS total_posts_and_comments

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1)) +
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE UserId = (SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1)) AS total_posts_and_comments

WITH latest_user AS (
  SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM latest_user)) +
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE UserId = (SELECT Id FROM latest_user)) AS total_posts_and_comments
